title: Legends of Eldoria
description: The modpack for the Legends of Eldoria Roleplay server!
body:
Legends of Eldoria is a world of roleplay, worldbuilding, and settlement creation all devised by Evoon and James_Thraugn, along with other supporting staff members!

Eldoria has collected many mods, addons, and content to bring our world to life with unique building blocks, armors, weapons, relics, and even creatures! All these combine together in the great melting pot to form the world of Eldoria, a diverse and wide world filled with 9 different fantasy races to play as! We utilize the Origins mod to bring these options to light even more, and have custom abilities, buffs, and debuffs for each and every race to ensure they are unique, while also utilizing Pehkui to change the scale and size of our players, ensuring even further that they can encapsulate themselves in the world and roleplay.

We foster and encourage great minds of creativity as well with our extensively written wiki, guides, and systems to encourage players to express themselves in their own manner, and having fun all the while! We encourage players to add their own mark to the stories and history of Eldoria, granted it's a reasonable act and not unrealistic (You cannot nuke the rat-men!).


So come and join along, make your mark on the world of Eldoria! Will you form a mighty human trade empire? Help the dwarves re-found their ancient world-spanning hegemony? Or bring the Draconians back to power, restoring their homelands?



Tributaries/Credits

Permission granted to use Obscure API by Obscurity within their modding discord.
Permission granted to use Nameless Trinkets by the curseforge page, as it is All Rights Reserved.
Quark Programmer Art is a resource pack automatically generated by the Quark Mod.
